description_long: This is a set of two round nesting coffee tables with elegant marble-patterned tops and gold-colored metal frames. The larger table features a wide, circular surface supported by three slender, curved metal legs that connect to a circular base ring, providing stability and a modern aesthetic. The smaller table is similarly constructed, designed to partially slide under the larger one for space-saving or decorative arrangements. Both tabletops have a smooth, glossy finish with subtle gold veining, mimicking natural marble. The gold metal frames are sleek and minimal, enhancing the luxurious appearance of the tables. These tables are suitable for contemporary urban environments, such as lobbies, lounges, or upscale outdoor patios.
description: A pair of round nesting coffee tables with marble-patterned tops and gold metal frames, featuring a modern, luxurious design.
description_view_0: View 0 shows both tables from an angle, highlighting the overlapping arrangement and the marble-patterned surfaces with gold frames.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the tables from the front, emphasizing the nesting feature and the symmetry of the circular frames.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the tables from the opposite side, revealing the open space beneath the larger table and the full circular base of the smaller table.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the tables from a rear angle, focusing on the edge alignment and the continuous gold frame structure.
attribute_number_of_legs: Three curved metal legs per table, connected by a circular base ring
